transcript: Speaker A: मैंने बहुत try किया, फिर भी मैं सही से english बोलना सीख नहीं पाया। तो क्या आपके पास इसके लिए कोई suggestion है? [I tried a lot, but still I couldn't learn to speak English correctly. So do you have any suggestions for this?] Speaker B: 1 Million से ज्यादा लोग SpeakX को try कर रहे हैं, You can try that. [More than 1 million people are trying SpeakX, you can try that.] Speaker A: लेकिन ऐसा क्या खास है SpeakX app में? [But what is so special about SpeakX app?] Speaker B: देखो English बोलना तभी आएगा जब तुम daily practice करोगे। इस app में है AI teacher जिससे तुम किसी भी topic पर English में बात कर सकते हो। इसमें ना बाकी apps की तरह boring classes होते हैं ना lecture। Daily 15-20 min practice करो, और तुम्हारी English automatically improve हो जाएगी। [Look, speaking English will only come when you practice daily. This app has an AI teacher with whom you can talk in English on any topic. Unlike other apps, it doesn't have boring classes or lectures. Practice daily for 15-20 mins, and your English will automatically improve.] Speaker A: फिर काफी महंगा होगा ना? [Then it must be quite expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं, सिर्फ 4 रुपये से पूरी English सीखना start कर सकते हो। [Not at all, you can start learning complete English from just 4 rupees.] Speaker A: Wow. [Wow.] Speaker B: Yes, आप भी try करो, and you will also feel confident in english. [Yes, you try too, and you will also feel confident in English.]
on_screen_text: मैंने बहुत try किया, फिर भी [I tried a lot, but still] मैं सही से english बोलना [I couldn't speak English correctly] सीख नहीं पाया। [couldn't learn.] तो क्या आपके पास इसके लिए [So do you have for this] कोई suggestion है? summary: A podcast-style ad where one speaker recommends the SpeakX app to another who struggles with English. The app features an AI teacher for daily 15-20 minute practice sessions without boring lectures, starting at just 4 rupees.
